title: friends.snapshot.json
description: Identity snapshot for friend-tier interlocutors of a trust-gate deployment. Friends receive a softer Gate policy than interlopers but cannot invoke tools.

version.description: Monotonic version number. Increment on every snapshot update. Used by the plugin to invalidate cached copies.

discord_id.description: Discord snowflake of this friend. Immutable trust anchor.

handle_hint.description: Display-name hint for impersonation detection. Not authoritative.

status.description: Current friend status. Only 'active' friends receive friend-tier treatment; 'suspended' and 'removed' are resolved to interloper tier.

added_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the friend was first added.

notes.description: Free-form operator notes. Not read by the plugin.
